name: list_secrets
description: List all secrets with metadata. Supports folder filtering.

arguments.name: folder_uid
arguments.desc: Optional folder UID to filter secrets by folder

name: get_secret
description: Retrieve a specific secret by UID. Sensitive fields are masked by default.

arguments.name: uid
arguments.desc: The UID of the secret to retrieve

name: search_secrets
description: Search secrets by title or content.

arguments.name: query
arguments.desc: Search query to match against secret titles and content

name: get_field
description: Get a specific field using KSM notation (e.g., UID/field/password).

arguments.name: notation
arguments.desc: KSM field notation string (e.g., UID/field/password)

name: generate_password
description: Create secure passwords with configurable parameters.

arguments.name: length
arguments.desc: Length of the password to generate

name: get_totp_code
description: Generate TOTP codes from configured TOTP secrets.

arguments.name: uid
arguments.desc: The UID of the secret containing a TOTP field

name: create_secret
description: Create a new KSM secret. Requires user confirmation.

arguments.name: title
arguments.desc: Title for the new secret

arguments.name: record_type
arguments.desc: KSM record type (e.g., login, bankAccount, contact)

arguments.name: folder_uid
arguments.desc: Folder UID where the secret will be created

arguments.name: fields
arguments.desc: JSON string of fields to set on the record

name: update_secret
description: Modify an existing secret with flattened field notation. Requires user confirmation.

arguments.name: uid
arguments.desc: The UID of the secret to update

arguments.name: fields
arguments.desc: JSON string of fields to update

name: delete_secret
description: Delete a secret. Requires user confirmation.

arguments.name: uid
arguments.desc: The UID of the secret to delete

name: upload_file
description: Attach a file to a secret. Requires user confirmation.

arguments.name: uid
arguments.desc: The UID of the secret to attach the file to

arguments.name: file_path
arguments.desc: Path to the file to upload

name: download_file
description: Extract file attachments from a secret.

arguments.name: uid
arguments.desc: The UID of the secret containing the file

arguments.name: file_name
arguments.desc: Name of the file to download

name: create_folder
description: Create a new shared folder. Requires user confirmation.

arguments.name: name
arguments.desc: Name for the new folder

arguments.name: parent_folder_uid
arguments.desc: UID of the parent folder

name: delete_folder
description: Delete a folder with optional force delete. Requires user confirmation.

arguments.name: uid
arguments.desc: The UID of the folder to delete

arguments.name: force
arguments.desc: Force delete even if folder contains items

name: health_check
description: Check server operational status and KSM connectivity.

name: get_record_type_schema
description: Get schema and structure for any KSM record type.

arguments.name: record_type
arguments.desc: The record type to get schema for (e.g., login, bankAccount, contact)

name: get_all_secrets_unmasked
description: Retrieve all secrets with complete unmasked data. Requires user confirmation.
